creator: r.quakkelaar@quaras.nl
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #22)
I only tried and succeeded in compiling on FreeBSD 11.4 i386 with GCC-8
and the standard makefile without any changes!

All other mentioned attempts with both clang-10 and GCC-9 (current) failed!
And there have been many attempts with all sorts of combinations of
CFLAGS, CXXFLAGS, USES_CXXSTD= and uses= compiler:(gcc-)c++(03|11|14|17)-(lib|lang)

The reason I tried GCC-8 in the first place, was because I read someone
experienced exactly the same problems running a Linux distro.

64-bit does compile and run normally with clang10 so I gather?
